title: Solidary obligations
doc_html:
Art. 1905.  Solidary obligations

If a solidary obligor becomes an obligee, confusion extinguishes the obligation only for the portion of that obligor.

If a solidary obligee becomes an obligor, confusion extinguishes the obligation only for the portion of that obligee.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
